sections.paragraph:
μετάλημψις (v.l. μετάληψις; on the μ cp. λαμβάνω, beg.), εως, ἡ (Pla.+; OGI 764, 15; POxy 1200, 36; 1273, 39; Philo, Plant. 74; Just., A I, 67, 5) the condition of having a share in someth., sharing ἃ ὁ θεὸς ἔκτισεν εἰς μ. τοῖς πιστοῖς which God created for the faithful to share in 1 Ti 4:3 (cp. μεταλαμβάνω 1). Others: receive (so NRSV).—DELG s.v. λαμβάνω. M-M. TW.

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

beg. beg. = beginning

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

someth. someth. = something

NRSV NRSV = New Revised Standard Version of the NT—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 639
